contexts.context: CG: I think it’s even more <mark>sophisticated</mark> when we use union steps, for example the…
…fold-right, but it’s a bit more <mark>sophisticated</mark> use.
…. I think if you want that degree of <mark>sophistication</mark>, you have to do it by hand.…
…I think. If you want to do more <mark>sophisticated</mark> things, write your own function.
